violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

The dumpster area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of trash, debris, and muck. This area is walked through by employees to access a door to the dry storage area of the basement. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023

The the entire area from the door up to and including the dry storage area has an accumulation of trash, rocks, dirt, etc. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Beef was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service area. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
